sections.paragraph:
Apollos - "The Eloquent Man," an efficient worker in the early church.

(1) General References to

Act 18:24; Act 19:1; 1Co 1:12; 1Co 3:4; 1Co 16:12; Tit 3:13

(2) Facts concerning

A converted Jew, eloquent, fervent, mighty in the Scriptures.

Act 18:24; Act 18:25

Instructed in the gospel by Aquila and Priscilla

Ac 18:26

Very popular in Corinth, where, apparently, a faction gathered about him.

1Co 1:11; 1Co 1:12; 1Co 3:4-6

Possibly hesitated to return there for that reason.

1Co 16:12
